features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The vulture has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Beak
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Aerial Scavenger - Flying pack hunter with excellent perception
tactical_info.positioning: Uses high flight speed and pack tactics for group aerial attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 2 piercing damage with pack tactics advantage when grouped
tactical_info.key_abilities: Pack Tactics, high perception (+3), excellent flight speed
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very low HP and AC, minimal individual damage
tactical_info.synergies: Effective in flocks, good for desert/wilderness encounters
